entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The primary cereal crop being improved for yield and resilience

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Intermittent water scarcity that constrains sorghum production

entities.name: GRAIN MOLD
entities.description: A disease that affects the productivity and quality of sorghum grains

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum to maintain productivity under water-limited conditions

entities.name: HIGH PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: A nutritional quality trait characterized by increased protein levels in the grain

entities.name: GRAIN MOLD TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the crop to resist or tolerate the incidence of grain mold disease

entities.name: AMMI
entities.description: Additive main effects and multiplicative interaction analysis used to evaluate stability and adaptability

entities.name: GGE BIPLOT
entities.description: Genotype and genotype x environment interaction analysis used to evaluate stability and adaptability

entities.name: SYSTEMATIC HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: A breeding process involving controlled crossing of superior landraces

entities.name: PEDIGREE-BASED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding method involving selection based on ancestral records

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: FODDER YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of vegetative biomass produced for animal feed

entities.name: PYPS 2
entities.description: A yellow pericarp sorghum variety identified as stable and tolerant to grain mold

entities.name: PYPS 4
entities.description: A sorghum variety identified as highly stable with low grain mold incidence

entities.name: PYPS 8
entities.description: A sorghum variety identified as highly stable with low grain mold incidence

entities.name: PYPS 11
entities.description: A sorghum variety identified as highly stable with low grain mold incidence

entities.name: RAINFED ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Agricultural environments that rely solely on rainfall for water

entities.name: HOT SPOT ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments with a high prevalence of grain mold disease

entities.name: DRYLAND CONDITIONS
entities.description: Arid or semi-arid environments where water is limited

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting crop productivity
